author: claude
content: Study-design doc (datadir/study-design-crawl-deployment.md) updated: added 4th vantage (university server, H6), the Krumnow-2022 per-vantage tool-detectability replication + instrument×vantage 2×2 (§5.4), sharpened headline RQ to datacenter-vs-residential-swarm, and reframed §7.3 storage as an explicit Stefan decision — Option 1 direct-to-public-Postgres (this vision) vs Option 2 edge-buffered split-sink — incl. the no-binds unstructured-data sub-choice (bytea/S3/disable). Open Qs 6/11/12 now gate this issue.
